ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "code" TEXT /* Airport code */,
  "iata" TEXT /* IATA code */,
  "kind" TEXT /* Type of airport (e.g., Small, Medium, Large, Closed) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance from the reference point */,
  "bearing" INTEGER /* Bearing from the reference point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport above sea level */,
  "runway_count" INTEGER /* Number of runways at the airport */,
  "runway_length" INTEGER /* Length of the longest runway (in meters) */,
  "terminal_count" INTEGER /* Number of terminals */,
  "gate_count" INTEGER /* Number of gates */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the airport (e.g., operational, closed) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airport */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the airport */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iata_codes" (
  "iata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IATA code */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport associated with the IATA code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the IATA code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the IATA code */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the IATA code (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iata_codes_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "code" TEXT /* Airline code */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft in the airline's fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_airlines" (
  "airport_airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport-airline relationship */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the airline started operating at the airport */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the airline stopped operating at the airport, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_airlines_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_airlines_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., airport administrator, airline staff, regulatory official) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "flight_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the flight */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., active, delayed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flight schedule was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the flight schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "flight_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight data */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on time, delayed, canceled) */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Weight of the cargo (in kilograms) */,
  "cargo_volume" REAL /* Volume of the cargo (in cubic meters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flight data was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the flight data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility (in kilometers) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover (in percentage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the weather data was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the weather data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_traffic_data" (
  "air_traffic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air traffic data */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "aircraft_count" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft */,
  "traffic_volume" REAL /* Traffic volume */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the air traffic data */,
  "average_flight_delay" INTEGER /* Average flight delay (in minutes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the air traffic data was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the air traffic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("air_traffic_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_traffic_data_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., flight schedule, weather data) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)
